{{Quote|With that healing ''narco-mist'' the medi-droid's spraying, Solo-- you won't even ''notice'' those broken ribs from your ''preliminary bout''.|Wheel Security Force officer|<ref name="SWM21" />}}
'''Narco-mist''' was a medicinal agent sprayed on the body of an injured being in order to help speed their recovery; it took the form of a reddish chemical mist. The patient did not feel any pain when the substance was applied. This spray was once applied to [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] by a [[Wheel medi-droid]] after his gladiator fight in [[The Big Game]], which had been staged by [[Simon Greyshade/Legends|Simon Greyshade]] during his stay on the space station known as [[The Wheel/Legends|The Wheel]].

==Behind the scenes==
The effects of narco-mist were not unlike those of [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]], which could also be applied in the form of a misty spray.
